title: Unit-Dubbing Profile Schema
description: Validation schema for dub.json profile — Unit-Dubbing pipeline config

topic.description: Video topic — used for workspace slug and metadata.

focus.description: Short focus hint passed to LLM fallback if used.

_profile.description: Profile key — must match filename in input/profile/.

channel.description: Channel name used in output filenames and metadata.

channel_lower.description: Lowercase channel name for URL/slug use.

dubbing_config.description: Full configuration block for Unit-Dubbing pipeline.

source_video.description: Absolute path to the source video file to dub.

script_path.description: Optional path to pre-existing transcript. If empty, Whisper auto-transcribes (if auto_transcribe_if_script_missing is true).

auto_transcribe_if_script_missing.description: If true and script_path is empty, automatically run Whisper on source_video to generate transcript.

tts_engine.description: TTS engine to use for synthesis.

tts_voice.description: Voice name for non-cloned TTS engines (e.g. Edge TTS neural voices).

voice_clone_enabled.description: Toggle voice cloning on/off. If true, uses xtts and voice_clone_config. If false, uses tts_engine + tts_voice.

whisper_model.description: Whisper model size for transcription. Larger = slower but more accurate.

sync_mode.description: Audio sync strategy. 'atempo' stretches dubbed audio to match video duration. 'none' uses as-is.

keep_bgm.description: Mix background music under dubbed audio.

bgm_volume.description: BGM volume level (0.0–1.0). Only used when keep_bgm=true.

bgm_path.description: Path to BGM audio file. Only used when keep_bgm=true.

chunk_max_chars.description: Max characters per XTTS synthesis chunk. Shorter = faster but more joins.

xtts_temperature.description: XTTS inference temperature. Lower = more stable, higher = more expressive.

xtts_speed.description: XTTS speech speed multiplier. <1.0 = slower, >1.0 = faster.

xtts_model_dir.description: Path to XTTS v2 model directory containing config.json and checkpoint files.

speaker_wav.description: Path to reference WAV file for voice cloning.

language.description: Target language code for XTTS synthesis.

use_cache.description: Cache synthesized audio to skip re-generation on re-run.

screen_ocr.description: Screen OCR extraction configuration for code-aware context merging.

enabled.description: Enable OCR extraction from video frames.

fps.description: Frames per second to sample for OCR. 0.2 = 1 frame every 5 seconds.

max_frames.description: Maximum number of frames to extract and process.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score (0.0-1.0) to keep UI/terminal text blocks.

code_confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score (0.0-1.0) to keep code blocks. Lower than UI threshold because code is denser.

cleanup_frames.description: Delete temporary frame images after OCR processing.

context_merge.description: Configuration for merging Whisper transcript with OCR screen text.

agent_name.description: LLM agent identifier for the merge task.

style.description: Narration style for the LLM prompt.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens for LLM response and context window slicing.

language.description: Target language for the enhanced narration output.

hologram.description: Optional hologram sci-fi filter applied after merge, before crop.

clip_speed.description: Playback speed multiplier applied during hologram render.

video_formats.description: Per-format crop, scale and output config. Each key is a format name.

enabled.description: Enable or disable this format entirely.

blur_pad.description: Use blurred background padding instead of black bars when AR doesn't match.

auto_crop.description: Smart auto-crop for landscape→vertical. Centers on middle auto_crop_center_pct of frame width. Ignores manual left/right when true.

auto_crop_center_pct.description: Fraction of frame width used as the center band for auto_crop. 0.55 = middle 55%. Tune 0.4–0.7 if speaker is off-center.

crop.description: Manual crop values in pixels. left/right ignored when auto_crop=true.

enabled.description: Apply crop. false = scale/pad only with no crop.

top.description: Pixels to remove from top (e.g. window title bar).

bottom.description: Pixels to remove from bottom (e.g. taskbar/terminal).

left.description: Pixels to remove from left (e.g. file tree sidebar). Ignored when auto_crop=true.

right.description: Pixels to remove from right. Ignored when auto_crop=true.
